reviews.author: Alexandre Ghiti
reviews.summary: Reviewer suggested tracing microbenchmarks to investigate performance issues in pcpu_memcg_post_alloc_hook, acknowledging Joshua's optimization idea
reviews.raw_body:
I get it, I'll trace the microbenchmarks to see what happens there, 
thanks for the suggestion.

Thanks again,

Alex

2026-05-21.patch_summary: This patch series introduces per-memcg-per-node kmem accounting, which allows for more granular memory allocation tracking. The current implementation has some potential performance issues when dealing with nested stock systems, where the obj_cgroup and local credit 'stocks' may be out of sync. To address this, the patch proposes precharging all pages, then iterating over each CPU to calculate page usage per node, followed by a final atomic operation for each node_objcg.
